output.code:
# load file
path="/mnt/data/file-8Fie4ytsv2ch6L3uHf8Qoa-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    raw_bytes = f.read()
raw = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8')
print(len(raw))
print(raw)

raw = raw
spans = [
("وَمَا كُنتُمْ تُخْفُونَ أَن يُبْدى لِلرَّسولِ مِنْ أَصَابَ بَعْضُكُمْ مِنْكُمْ أَوْ أَنتُمْ أَصَحُّ لَهُ بِهِ","Aya"),
("لَمْ يَكُنْ لِعِيسَى عِلْمٌ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ","Hadeeth"),
("لَمْ يَكُنْ لِسيدنا مُحَمَدٍ عِلْمٌ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ","Hadeeth"),
("وَمَا يَنْظُرُونَ إِلّا صَيْحَةً وَاحِدَةً تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَزِحُونَ","Aya"),
("لا عِلْمَ لِأَحَدٍ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ","Hadeeth")
]
results=[]
for text,ctype in spans:
    start = raw.find(text)
    print(text, "found at", start)
    if start!=-1:
        end = start + len(text)
        # verify
        assert raw[start:end]==text
        results.append((start,end,text,ctype))
results

all_results=[]
for text,ctype in spans:
    start=0
    found=[]
    while True:
        idx = raw.find(text,start)
        if idx==-1:
            break
        found.append((idx, idx+len(text)))
        start = idx+1
    print(text,"occurs",len(found),"times at",found)
    for s,e in found:
        all_results.append((s,e,text,ctype))
all_results_sorted = sorted(all_results, key=lambda x:x[0])
all_results_sorted
